chunks.text: ORDER SHEET I N T HE HI G H CO U R T O F S I N DH B E N C H AT S U K K U R C. P No. D – 1207 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For hearing of CMA No.4806/2025 (S/A) 2. For hearing of main case 09.12.2025 Mr. Saif-ur-Rehman Naich, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Abdul Mujeeb Shaikh, Advocate for Respondents/SEPCO Syed Naveed Ahmed Shah, Deputy Attorney General along with Mairajuddin, Executive Engineer and Muhammad Suleman Dahri, A.M (Legal) SEPCO >>>>>>>>>..<<<<<<<< Learned counsel appearing for the respondents/SEPCO files a statement along with certain documents, which is taken on record. A copy thereof is supplied to learned counsel for the petitioner. Learned counsel for the respondents/SEPCO submits that the order passed by the Provincial Electric Inspector, Sukkur has now been complied with and the amount directed therein has been deducted. However, some amount is still outstanding against the petitioner, and upon full payment of the outstanding dues, the status of the meter will be changed to Permanent Disconnected (PD). In view of the above statement made by learned counsel for the respondents/SEPCO, the instant petition is disposed of. The respondents/SEPCO are directed to do the needful and, after full payment of the outstanding amount, to change the status of the meter accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
